callGraph.callee:
findOverlappingRules(rules, {
          buffet_id: ruleDraft.buffet_id,
          time_slot_id: ruleDraft.time_slot_id,
          calendar_kind: ruleDraft.calendar_kind,
          valid_from: ruleDraft.valid_from,
          valid_to: ruleDraft.valid_to,
          excludeId: ruleModal.mode === 'edit' ? ruleModal.id : undefined,
        })
          .map

functions.name: MenuManager
params:
{
  restaurantId,
  initialItems,
  initialCategories,
  initialPrintStations,
  initialTab = MENU_MANAGER_DEFAULT_TAB,
}

callGraph.callee:
categories
        .filter((c) => c.parent_id === parentId && c.active)
        .sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order)
        .flatMap

categories
        .filter((c) => c.parent_id === parentId && c.active)
        .sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order)
        .flatMap

categories
      .filter((c) => (c.parent_id || null) === parentId && c.active)
      .sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order)
      .map

functions.name: BuffetPriceMatrix
params:
{
  buffetId,
  buffets,
  slots,
  rules,
  t,
  dayKindLabel,
  onSetPrice,
}

callGraph.callee:
rules
    .filter(
      (r) =>
        r.is_active &&
        r.buffet_id === buffetId &&
        r.time_slot_id === slotId &&
        r.calendar_kind === kind &&
        ruleCoversDate(r, today),
    )
    .sort
